height="259.62874985881353" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="<p><span style="font-size: 15px;">Ideal Gas Law:&nbsp;</span></p><p></p><ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Find combinations of state, material and closed system</span></li><ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">System I, Material Gas, State 1</span></li><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">System I, Material Gas, State 2</span></li></ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Check Ideal Gas Rule for all combinations</span></li><ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">check Material.Equation of State.model equals ideal gas</span></li><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Material Gas has Equation Of State EOS. The model of EOS is <i>ideal gas</i></span></li><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Rule is satisfied for both combinations</span></li></ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Create Equation for both combinations and adjust expression</span></li><ul><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Ideal Gas Law 1: `p_1 * V_1 = m_I * R_{Gas} * T_1`</span></li><li><span style="font-size: 15px;">Ideal Gas Law 2: `p_2 * V_2 = m_I * R_{Gas} * T_2`</span></li></ul></ul><p></p>" li.span: Find combinations of state, material and closed system
Check Ideal Gas Rule for all combinations
check Material.Equation of State.model equals ideal gas
Material Gas has Equation Of State EOS. The model of EOS is ideal gas
Rule is satisfied for both combinations
Create Equation for both combinations and adjust expression
